author: Gustavo de Aguiar Martins

interpretation.boundary: This is a contract validator, not runtime evidence and not final R3 cutover approval.
interpretation.purpose: Validate that the R3 runtime capture matrix, evidence guard and instrumentation plan form one coherent runtime contract.
interpretation.sovereignty: The final runtime path becomes harder to mislabel because the contract itself is checked before fresh runtime evidence is accepted.

recommendations: Run this contract validator after changing any R3 capture, guard or instrumentation logic.
Do not accept final runtime JSONL unless this contract validation remains ready.
Keep R3 runtime events slot-bound through tension.components.r3_runtime_slot_id.
Keep final runtime events native through proof.native=true and source.format=native_pnva_event_v1.
